arts.ttl: Brighton defender Tariq Lamptey set to join Ajax with forward Chuba Akpom poised to leave the Dutch club for Lille
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: The Dutch giants are ready to pay a cut price £1.5million for 24-year-old Lamptey with the pacey full-back out of contract this summer.

arts.ttl: Brighton to sell Tariq Lamptey to Premier League rival in cut-price move?
arts.sum: Leicester City are reportedly exploring a cut-price deal for Brighton & Hove Albion defender Tariq Lamptey before the end of the winter window.

arts.ttl: Ranking the favourites to sign Evan Ferguson
arts.sum: Brighton forward Evan Ferguson is one to watch ahead of the final days of the January transfer window. Ferguson has failed to earn a regular role in Fabian Hurzeler’s role and is open to an exit in search of minutes. Loan proposals and permanent offers are understood to be under consideration, with a wealth of […] The post Ranking the favourites to sign Evan Ferguson first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Al-Nassr end attempts to sign Brighton's Mitoma
arts.sum: Al-Nassr end their attempts to sign Brighton's Kaoru Mitoma after the Seagulls make it clear they have no intention of selling the Japan forward.
